en: I think as sports fans, we kind of had it coming, right?
ko: 스포츠 팬으로서 좀 자초한 감이 있지, 맞지?

en: Because how many times have you gone to a game, right?
You got a little too drunk, you started screaming at some dude on the field,
ko: 좀 과하게 취해서, 그라운드에 있는 선수한테 소리 지르기 시작하는데,

en: who could clearly kick the shit out of you, right?
ko: 그 사람이 널 확실히 패줄 수 있는데, 맞지?

en: If you saw him in the parking lot, you'd be like,
hey, can you sign my stamp collection? I think you're awesome.
ko: 사인해 주실 수 있어요? 당신 진짜 대단해요.

en: You get in the game, you're all drunk, you're like, you suck, buddy!
ko: 경기장에 들어가면 취해서, 야, 넌 못 해!

en: You're like beating up whole rows of people at once, like...
ko: 한 줄 전체를 동시에 패는 것처럼...
